description: A problem, bug, issue, or error encountered in a technical context

name.description: Short identifying name or title of the problem

description.description: Detailed description of the problem, including symptoms and context

status.description: Current status (e.g., open, investigating, resolved, closed)

affected_component.description: The component, module, or system area affected by the problem

workaround.description: Temporary mitigation or alternative approach while a permanent fix is pending
